标题:
Alexander Wang Textured Grey Lettered Pants: A blend of relaxed and refined style. Crafted from 100% cotton herringbone fabric with a matte finish, the texture is dense yet flexible, offering a soft but structured feel. Unlike typical cotton pants that appear sloppy, these provide a breathable ease, preventing sweat buildup during long wear. Suitable for spring and autumn alone or layered in winter.

Waist design features an elastic band with decorative buttons, balancing comfort and formality, accommodating various waist sizes without discomfort after meals.

Cut: Slightly wide straight-leg with natural drape, flaring gently from the hips to conceal thigh and calf lines. Pair with dress shoes for a polished look or sneakers for casual street style.

Length: Cropped just above the ankle for a clean finish, ideal for showing shoe details; taller wearers can cuff for a relaxed vibe.

Details: Side vertical embossed "Alexander Wang NEW YORK" lettering in tone-on-tone subtle print for understated branding. Reinforced rivets and double stitching on pockets enhance durability and add a premium industrial touch. Inner labels and zippers are custom-matched in color.

Sizes available: XS to L.

Alexanderwang Wide-Leg Functional Casual Pants unlock effortless style, a wardrobe essential for men. Featuring a loose wide-leg fit, they break traditional constraints, offering ample legroom for comfortable movement. Crafted from soft, breathable fabric, they stay dry and comfortable even after long wear. Smooth, draping lines flatter the legs, making them appear longer and straighter. Available in classic black and gray for a refined look, or light khaki and army green for a casual vibe. Easy to pair for a relaxed or smart-casual style. Sizes: M-3XL.

Top and pants Alexander Wang 2025 FW early spring new logo hoodie and sweatpants set. Premium double-ply 400g heavyweight pure cotton fabric. Custom ribbed cuffs with matching dye. Complete three-label authentication. Unisex. Sizes: S-XXL.

Top and pants Alexander Wang 2025 FW early spring new logo hoodie and sweatpants set. Premium double-ply 400g heavyweight pure cotton fabric. Custom ribbed cuffs with matching dye. Complete three-label authentication. Unisex. Sizes: S-XXL.

Alexander Wang 2025 SS Fall/Winter casual sports sweatpants featuring distinctive side "Wang" embroidery. Elastic drawstring waistband and cuffed ankles. Soft, smooth fabric with good shape retention and low-stretch fibers for optimal elasticity and wrinkle resistance. Sizes: S-XXL.

Alexander Wang 2025 SS Fall/Winter casual sports sweatpants featuring distinctive side "Wang" embroidery. Elastic drawstring waistband and cuffed ankles. Soft, smooth fabric with good shape retention and low-stretch fibers for optimal elasticity and wrinkle resistance. Sizes: S-XXL.

Alexander Wang minimalist vintage-style sweatpants, perfect for early autumn. Loose silhouette with relaxed fit for ultimate comfort. Ideal for home, casual outings, or shopping. Versatile for layering, solo wear, or outerwear. Premium 430g cotton terry fabric offers a free-spirited, effortlessly cool vibe with subtle "Wang" sensuality. Classic vintage-inspired colors. Sizes: S-XXL.
